name: python3-enchant
title: python3-enchant
description:
spellchecking library for Python 3
PyEnchant consists of Python bindings to the Enchant spellchecking
library and some wrapper classes. It includes all the functionality
of Enchant in a Pythonic object-oriented interface, and also provides
some higher-level functionality which is not available in the C API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-enchant because spellchecking library for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-enchant as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-enchant with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-enchant --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
